Program for Inferring Immunoglobulin Allele Similarity Clusters and Genotypes

Documentation for package ‘piglet’ version 1.2.0

  • DESCRIPTION file.
  • User guides, package vignettes and other documentation.
  • Package NEWS.

Help Pages

alleleClusterNames Allele similarity cluster naming scheme
allele_cluster_table Allele similarity cluster table
allele_diff Alleles nucleotide position difference
allele_diff_indices Calculate differences between characters in columns of germs and return their indices as an int vector.
allele_diff_indices_parallel Calculate SNPs or their count for each germline-input sequence pair with optional parallel execution.
allele_diff_indices_parallel2 Calculate SNPs or their count for each germline-input sequence pair with optional parallel execution.
allele_diff_strings Calculate differences between characters in columns of germs and return them as a string vector.
allele_threshold_table Allele thresholds table
artificialFRW1Germline FWR1 artificial dataset generator
assignAlleleClusters Assign allele similarity clusters
detect_communities_leiden Leiden community detection
distance_to_graph Convert distance matrix to weighted graph
extractASCTable Extracts the allele cluster table from the archive file.
generateReferenceSet Generate allele similarity reference set
germlineASC Converts IGHV germline set to ASC germline set.
HVGERM Human IGHV germlines
hv_functionality Human IGHV germlines functionality description
igClust Allele similarity clustering
igDistance Germline set alleles distance
ighvClust Allele similarity clustering (deprecated)
ighvDistance Germline set alleles distance (deprecated)
inferAlleleClusters Allele similarity cluster
inferGenotypeAllele Allele based genotype inference
inferGenotypeAllele_asc Allele similarity cluster based genotype inference Testing function
insert_gaps2_vec Insert gaps into an ungapped sequence based on a gapped reference sequence.
new_germline_cluster Create a GermlineCluster object
optimize_resolution Optimize resolution parameter using silhouette score
piglet The Program for Ig clusters (PIgLET) package
plot.GermlineCluster Plot method for GermlineCluster
plotAlleleCluster Plotting the dendrogram of the clusters
plotClusterComparison Compare hierarchical and Leiden clustering
plotCommunityNetwork Plot community network
plotSilhouetteOptimization Plot silhouette optimization results
plotTruncatedTree Plot truncated tree visualization
print.GermlineCluster Print method for GermlineCluster
recentAlleleClusters Retrieving allele similarity clusters Zenodo archive
summary.GermlineCluster Summary method for GermlineCluster
zenodoArchive zenodoArchive
